title: FuninCrea Coin Purse 2 Pieces, Nylon Coin Purses for Women and Girls, Colorful and Double Sided Sequin Coin Wallet, Mini Purse with Kiss Lock for Change, Keys, Headset, Lipstick(Sequins, Multicolor)
features: 【High-quality Nylon and Colorful Sequins】:The girls purses is made of nylon and sequins, and the waterproof and wear-resistant feature of nylon makes you not have to worry about the change being soaked in the rain. The multicolored sequins make the wallet more fashionable and brilliant.

【Small and Lightweight- Easy to Carry】:The size of this coin pouch is 8x7.5cm and the weight is 20g, which makes the wallet easy to carry and fits perfectly in a pocket or handbag, ideal for everyday commutes and travel to store change and coin.

【Kiss Lock Design- Easy to use】:The strong kiss lock ensures that your coin and other small items won't slip out of your sequin purse. With this design, you can quickly take out and put in the cards and change what you want to save time.

【Widely Used】:The small purses is enough for your daily use, which can hold coin, keys or lipstick, etc. Only one pocket design reduces internal space waste and no need to spend time sorting in your emergency.
【Best Gift for Her】:The mini coin purse would be an excellent gift for women and girls, perfect as a gift for Christmas, Valentine's Day, Easter, Anniversary, Mother's Day, and Children’s Day.
